---

## Problem Statement

What failure mode or governance gap does this pattern address?
<!-- Be specific: what went wrong, what environment (trading/lending/insurance/compliance), what the consequence was -->

## Regulatory Context

Which regulation(s) require this type of control?
<!-- EU AI Act, MiFID II, SEC Rule 17a-4, SR 11-7, FCA, MAS, APRA, SOC 2, other -->

## Proposed Pattern

Describe the pattern at a high level:
- **Input:** what triggers it
- **Decision logic:** what it evaluates
- **Output:** what action it produces
- **Human touchpoint:** where a human must be in or on the loop

## Existing References

Are there existing implementations, papers, or frameworks you're aware of that address this?
<!-- Links, citations, ADRs from your own system (anonymized) -->

## Priority

How urgently does your team need this?
- [ ] Blocking — we cannot ship without it
- [ ] High — would accelerate our timeline significantly
- [ ] Medium — nice to have in v1.1
- [ ] Low — long-term roadmap
